untranslatable_reason: BB (Bulkowski) pattern requires: (1) Pattern identification/classification logic not expressible as simple indicator conditions - requires multi-bar shape recognition and categorization as 'tall' vs 'short'; (2) Height calculation (High-Low)/Breakout_Price compared to rolling median - requires dynamic reference to a specific breakout price level that must be identified first; (3) Trend change detection 5-6 weeks post-breakout with context-dependent direction (bearish reversal on upbreakout in bear markets vs bullish reversal on downbreakout in bull markets) - requires regime classification not available in indicator set. The pattern logic is inherently structural/morphological and cannot be decomposed into the available price/volume/momentum indicators without access to pattern shape recognition algorithms.
